title: alyssum campestre var. collinum
intro: Alyssum campestre var. collinum, also known as mountain alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and acting as an antioxidant. Alyssum campestre var. collinum can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional folk medicine to support overall well-being.
